settings.title: Shipping & returns
settings.content: Most orders ship within 1–2 business days and arrive in 3–6 business days. Free returns and exchanges within 30 days of delivery, as long as the piece is unworn.

settings.title: Materials & care
settings.content: Crafted from brass and stainless-steel bases with 14k gold or rhodium plating — nickel-free and gentle on sensitive skin. Avoid perfume, lotion, and swimming pools to keep the shine going longer.

settings.title: No tarnish, all compliments
settings.text: Wore this every day for three weeks straight — no tarnish, no green fingers, just compliments.

settings.title: Feels like a gift to myself
settings.text: Looks so much more expensive than it was. Packaging alone made it feel like a gift to myself.

settings.title: Beautiful, shipping ran long
settings.text: Beautiful piece, fits true to size. Shipping took a couple days longer than expected but worth the wait.

settings.title: Better than the designer version
settings.text: I compared this side-by-side with a piece ten times the price and honestly could not tell the difference.
